Script.name: MobSearcherScript
Script.script:
MobSearcher = MobSearcher or {} MobSearcher.results = MobSearcher.results or {} MobSearcher.config = MobSearcher.config or { channel = "", debug = false }
local function gmcp_value(path) local node = gmcp for key in path:gmatch("[^%.]+") do if type(node) ~= "table" then return nil end node = node[key] end return node end
local function msg(color, text) cecho(string.format("<%s>[MobSearcher] %s\n", color, text)) end
local function dbg(text) if MobSearcher.config.debug then msg("slate_blue", "[debug] " .. tostring(text)) end end
local function db_path() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") return home .. "/snd.db" end
local function resolve_sqlite() if type(sqlite3) == "table" and type(sqlite3.open) == "function" then return sqlite3, "global sqlite3" end
local ok_lsqlite3, lib_lsqlite3 = pcall(require, "lsqlite3") if ok_lsqlite3 and type(lib_lsqlite3) == "table" and type(lib_lsqlite3.open) == "function" then return lib_lsqlite3, "require('lsqlite3')" end
local ok_sqlite3, lib_sqlite3 = pcall(require, "sqlite3") if ok_sqlite3 and type(lib_sqlite3) == "table" and type(lib_sqlite3.open) == "function" then return lib_sqlite3, "require('sqlite3')" end
return nil, nil end
local function open_db() local sqlite = resolve_sqlite() if not sqlite then msg("red", "No Lua sqlite3 binding found (expected global sqlite3, lsqlite3, or sqlite3 module).") return nil end
local db = sqlite.open(db_path()) if not db then msg("red", "Failed to open mobs DB: " .. db_path()) return nil end
dbg("Opened database: " .. db_path()) return db end
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/mobsearch_state.lua"
local function persist_load() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local loaded = nil local ok, data = pcall(dofile, STATE_FILE) if ok and type(data) == "table" then loaded = data if type(loaded[1]) == "table" and type(loaded.channel) ~= "string" and type(loaded.debug) ~= "boolean" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end end if not loaded and type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, data2 = pcall(table.load, STATE_FILE) if ok2 and type(data2) == "table" then loaded = data2 end end end loaded = loaded or {}
if type(loaded.channel) == "string" then MobSearcher.config.channel = loaded.channel end if type(loaded.debug) == "boolean" then MobSearcher.config.debug = loaded.debug end dbg("Loaded config: channel='" .. tostring(MobSearcher.config.channel or "") .. "', debug=" .. tostring(MobSearcher.config.debug)) end
local function persist_save() local payload = { channel = MobSearcher.config.channel or "", debug = (MobSearcher.config.debug == true), }
local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. string.format("{ channel = %q, debug = %s }", payload.channel, tostring(payload.debug))) f:close() end end
local function report_message_plain(row) return string.format("%s is found in %s in %s (mapper goto %s)", row[1], row[4], row[2], row[3]) end
local function report_message_colored(row) return string.format("<gray>%s<white> is found in <green>%s<white> in <yellow>%s<white> (<cyan>mapper goto %s<white>)", row[1], row[4], row[2], row[3]) end
local function report_message_channel(row) return string.format("@W%s @wis found in @g%s @win @y%s @w(@cmapper goto %s@w)", row[1], row[4], row[2], row[3]) end
local function area_level_label(minLvl, maxLvl) local minN = tonumber(minLvl) local maxN = tonumber(maxLvl) if minN and maxN then return string.format("%d-%d", minN, maxN) end return "?" end
local function parse_search_input(rawInput) local input = tostring(rawInput or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") local zone = "all"
local maybeZone, rest = input:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") if maybeZone and (maybeZone:lower() == "here" or maybeZone:lower() == "all") then zone = maybeZone input = rest end
local levelToken = input:match("%s+(%d+%s*%-%s*%d+)%s*$") or input:match("%s+(%d+)%s*$") local lvlFilter = nil if levelToken then input = input:sub(1, #input - #levelToken):gsub("%s+$", "") local minLevel, maxLevel = levelToken:match("^(%d+)%s*%-%s*(%d+)$") if minLevel and maxLevel then lvlFilter = { min = tonumber(minLevel), max = tonumber(maxLevel) } else local exact = tonumber(levelToken) if exact then lvlFilter = exact end end end
local mobName = input local quotedName = mobName:match('^"(.-)"$') or mobName:match("^'(.-)'$") if quotedName then mobName = quotedName end
return zone, mobName, lvlFilter end
function MobSearcher.reportRow(idx) local row = MobSearcher.results[idx] if not row then msg("orange", "No result row " .. tostring(idx) .. " loaded.") return end
local line = report_message_channel(row) local channel = MobSearcher.config.channel or ""
if channel ~= "" then send(channel .. " " .. line) else cecho(string.format("<cyan>[MobSearcher] %s\n", report_message_colored(row))) end end
function MobSearcher.setChannelAlias(matches) local value = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
if value == "" or value:lower() == "default" then MobSearcher.config.channel = "" persist_save() msg("orange", "Reporting channel reset to default (colored note output).") return end
MobSearcher.config.channel = value persist_save() msg("ansi_light_green", "Reporting channel set to: " .. value) end
function MobSearcher.setDebugAlias(matches) local value = ((matches and matches[2]) or (matches and matches[1]) or ""):lower():gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
if value == "on" then MobSearcher.config.debug = true persist_save() msg("ansi_light_green", "Debug output enabled.") return end
if value == "off" then MobSearcher.config.debug = false persist_save() msg("orange", "Debug output disabled.") return end
msg("cyan", "Debug is currently " .. (MobSearcher.config.debug and "ON" or "OFF") .. ". Use: msearch debug on|off") end
function MobSearcher.searchMobs(mobn, areaz, lvl) local db = open_db() if not db then return end
MobSearcher.results = {} areaz = tostring(areaz or "all") mobn = tostring(mobn or "")
if areaz:upper() == "HERE" then areaz = tostring(gmcp_value("room.info.zone") or "") end
local function esc(v) return tostring(v or ""):gsub("'", "''") end
local minLvl, maxLvl if type(lvl) == "table" then minLvl = tonumber(lvl.min) maxLvl = tonumber(lvl.max) elseif tonumber(lvl) then minLvl = tonumber(lvl) maxLvl = tonumber(lvl) end
local query = [[ SELECT mobs.mob, mobs.room, mobs.roomid, mobs.zone, mobs.seen_count, mobs.kill_count, area.minlvl AS area_minlvl, area.maxlvl AS area_maxlvl FROM mobs LEFT JOIN area ON (area.key = mobs.zone OR area.name = mobs.zone) WHERE mobs.mob LIKE '%]] .. esc(mobn) .. [[%' ]] local searchmsg = "Searching for " .. mobn
if areaz:upper() ~= "ALL" and areaz ~= "" then query = query .. " AND (mobs.zone = '" .. esc(areaz) .. "' OR mobs.zone IN (SELECT key FROM area WHERE name = '" .. esc(areaz) .. "'))" searchmsg = searchmsg .. " in " .. areaz end
if minLvl and maxLvl then query = query .. " AND mobs.zone IN (SELECT key FROM area WHERE minlvl <= " .. maxLvl .. " AND maxlvl >= " .. minLvl .. ")" if minLvl == maxLvl then searchmsg = searchmsg .. " at level " .. tostring(minLvl) else searchmsg = searchmsg .. string.format(" for level range %d-%d", minLvl, maxLvl) end end
query = query .. " ORDER BY COALESCE(mobs.seen_count, 0) DESC, mobs.mob ASC, mobs.room ASC" dbg("Query: " .. query)
msg("orange", searchmsg .. "...") cecho("<magenta>+-----+------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------+------------+---------+--------+-------+\n") cecho("<magenta>| <white># <magenta>| <white>Mob name <magenta>| <green>Room name <magenta>| <cyan>ID <magenta>| <yellow>Zone <magenta>| <cyan>Level <magenta>| <white>Seen <magenta>| <white>Prob <magenta>|\n") cecho("<magenta>+-----+------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------+------------+---------+--------+-------+\n")
local seenTotalsByMob = {} local okTotals, totalsErr = pcall(function() for row in db:nrows(query) do local mob = tostring(row.mob or "") local seen = tonumber(row.seen_count or 0) or 0 seenTotalsByMob[mob] = (seenTotalsByMob[mob] or 0) + seen end end) if not okTotals then msg("red", "Failed while reading summary rows: " .. tostring(totalsErr)) dbg("Summary read error: " .. tostring(totalsErr)) db:close() return end
local count = 0 local okRows, rowsErr = pcall(function() for row in db:nrows(query) do count = count + 1 local mob = tostring(row.mob or "") local room = tostring(row.room or "") local rid = tostring(row.roomid or "") local zone = tostring(row.zone or "") local seen = tonumber(row.seen_count or 0) or 0 local levelLabel = area_level_label(row.area_minlvl, row.area_maxlvl) local totalSeen = tonumber(seenTotalsByMob[mob] or 0) or 0 local probability = 0 if totalSeen > 0 then probability = (seen / totalSeen) * 100 end
table.insert(MobSearcher.results, { mob, zone, rid, room })
local mobLabel = mob:sub(1, 28) local roomLabel = room:sub(1, 23) local rowIdx = count
cecho("<magenta>| <cyan>") echoLink(string.format("%-2d", rowIdx), function() MobSearcher.reportRow(rowIdx) end, "Report row " .. rowIdx, true) cecho(string.format(" <magenta>| <white>%-28s <magenta>| <green>%-23s <magenta>| <cyan>", mobLabel, roomLabel)) echoLink(rid, function() expandAlias("mapper goto " .. rid) end, "mapper goto " .. rid, true) cecho(string.format("<magenta>%s| <yellow>%-10s <magenta>| <cyan>%-7s <magenta>| <white>%5d <magenta>| <white>%5.1f%% <magenta>|\n", string.rep(" ", math.max(0, 12 - #rid)), zone, levelLabel, seen, probability)) end end) if not okRows then msg("red", "Search failed while reading rows: " .. tostring(rowsErr)) dbg("Row read error: " .. tostring(rowsErr)) end
if count == 0 then cecho("<magenta>| <tomato>No matches found <magenta>|\n") end
cecho("<magenta>+-----+------------------------------+-------------------------+-------------+------------+---------+--------+-------+\n") if count == 1 then msg("orange", "1 match found. Click the row number to report it.") elseif count > 1 then msg("orange", count .. " matches found. Click any row number to report it.") end
db:close() end
function MobSearcher.onSearch(matches) local rawInput = (matches and matches[2]) or "" local p1 = rawInput:match("^(%S+)") or ""
if p1:upper() == "CHANNEL" then local rest = rawInput:gsub("^%S+%s*", "") MobSearcher.setChannelAlias({ "", rest }) return end
if p1:upper() == "DEBUG" then local rest = rawInput:gsub("^%S+%s*", "") MobSearcher.setDebugAlias({ "", rest }) return end
if p1:upper() == "HELP" then cecho("<sky_blue>[MobSearcher] Commands:\n") cecho("<white> msearch <mob>\n") cecho("<white> msearch <mob> <level>\n") cecho("<white> msearch <mob> <min-max>\n") cecho("<white> msearch <here|all> <mob>\n") cecho("<white> msearch <here|all> <mob> <level|min-max>\n") cecho("<white> msearch channel <chat command>\n") cecho("<white> msearch channel default\n") cecho("<white> msearch debug on|off\n") cecho("<white> mreport <row#> (report row to channel/default output)\n") cecho("<white> mgo <row#> (mapper goto that row's room)\n") cecho("<light_grey>Examples: msearch \"demonic soldier\" | msearch demonic soldier 45 | msearch here soldier 40-55\n") return end
local zone, name, lvlFilter = parse_search_input(rawInput)
if #name < 2 then msg("orange", "You need at least 2 characters of the mob name.") return end
MobSearcher.searchMobs(name, zone, lvlFilter) end
function MobSearcher.mobShow(matches) local idx = tonumber(matches[2] or "0") if idx < 1 or not MobSearcher.results[idx] then msg("orange", "No results loaded. Try searching first.") return end MobSearcher.reportRow(idx) end
function MobSearcher.mobGo(matches) local idx = tonumber(matches[2] or "0") if idx < 1 or not MobSearcher.results[idx] then msg("orange", "No results loaded. Try searching first.") return end expandAlias("mapper goto " .. MobSearcher.results[idx][3]) end
persist_load() msg("orange", "Loaded. Use 'msearch help' for usage.")
